ERR_NOT_FOUND: The requested item was not found
ERR_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action
ERR_SETUP_ALREADY_COMPLETE: Initial setup has already been completed
ERR_PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
ERR_SUBJECT_NOT_FOUND: The selected subject was not found
ERR_SUBJECT_NAME_TAKEN: A subject with this name already exists
ERR_SUBJECT_IN_USE: This subject is used by one or more classes and cannot be deleted
ERR_CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own account
ERR_LAST_ADMIN: The last administrator cannot be deleted or demoted
ERR_STUDENT_ALREADY_EXISTS: A student with the same grade, class, and number already exists
ERR_STUDENT_CLASS_NO_INVALID: Class number must be between 1 and 99
ERR_STUDENT_NUMBER_INVALID: Student number must be between 1 and 99
